{{Quote|You, Tolok Naap. You fought beside me only a few tens of cycles ago. You believe me cursed by the gods?|Vua Rapuung to Tolok Naap|<ref name="Conquest" />}}
'''Tolok Naap''' was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Tens of cycles before the [[Invasion of Yavin 4]], Naap was part of the war party of [[Vua Rapuung]]. When Rapuung resurfaced on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with [[Anakin Solo]], Naap was part of a group of warriors who attempted to stop them from reaching the [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[Mezhan Kwaad]]. He challenged Rapuung to personal combat, commanding him to take up an [[amphistaff]]. Rapuung refused, deigning to fight him with his bare hands. Eighty seconds later, Naap and his group had all been killed.<ref name="Conquest" />
